Title: MET SLG AI Hackathon — Mar 2026
Outcomes: 7 use cases captured; 4 advanced to follow-up; 1 production candidate scoped with DOB IT.
LessonsLearned: Demo WiFi saturated during judging; pre-stage agency data access earlier; allocate explicit capture time on day 2.

Title: NY State Agencies AI Hackathon — Jan 2026
Outcomes: 5 use cases captured; 2 production candidates; document-extraction pattern reused from a prior event.
LessonsLearned: Hybrid demo audio was inconsistent; agency data access not provisioned before day 1 (recurring blocker).
